navbar.logo_alt: GeoTapp — The platform that makes work verifiable

footer.tagline: Field activity recorded. Operations organised. Reports verifiable.

landing.hero_badge: The work happened. Now make it provable.
landing.hero_title: If you can't prove it, the client says it never happened.
landing.hero_subtitle: GeoTapp turns every field job into objective evidence: sealed reports with real GPS data, timestamped photo proof and documentation anyone can verify — without trusting you, without disputes.
landing.trust_gps_desc: Every job certified with location and timestamp
landing.features_subtitle: Three integrated tools: the field records, the office controls, the client verifies.
landing.cta_title: The work happened. Now prove it.
landing.cta_subtitle: Companies using GeoTapp no longer lose undocumented jobs. Every hour is verifiable. Every report is defensible.
landing.problem_subtitle: It's not an organisation problem. It's a proof problem.

problem_items.title: The client denies it. You have no proof.
problem_items.desc: The job happened. But without verifiable documentation, it's your word against theirs. And often they win.

problem_items.title: Reports arrive incomplete, late or not at all.
problem_items.desc: Paper forms, WhatsApp, email. Data gets lost, altered, forgotten. Reconstructing it afterwards is costly and unreliable.

problem_items.title: Undocumented work is unbillable work.
problem_items.desc: Every undocumented hour is an unpaid hour. Every job without proof is a job the client can dispute.

landing.report_section_title: The report. Not a summary. A proof.
landing.report_section_subtitle: Every GeoTapp report is generated automatically from real field data.
landing.report_section_body: GPS clock-ins, timestamped photos, operational notes. The system applies a cryptographic seal that makes any modification detectable. The result is not a document to send to the client. It's proof the client can verify independently.
landing.report_feature_1: Tamper-proof after generation — any modification is detectable
landing.report_feature_2: Verifiable without an account — by anyone, independently
landing.report_feature_3: GPS and photo data integrated and inseparable
landing.report_cta: See how your client verifies it independently

flow.title: The office sees everything. In real time.
flow.subtitle: Flow is the operational hub: jobs, tasks, progress and structured reports. The field works. The office knows.

features.crm: Job Management: Every intervention is structured from the start, with assigned technician, location and live status.
features.pipeline: Automatic documentation: Every completed job generates a ready report — no manual entry, no errors.

app.title: The technician records. The proof forms.
app.subtitle: TimeTracker is the mobile app that collects evidence from the field: clock-in, clock-out, photo proof, notes. All linked to the job, all sealed. Available on Android and iOS.

verifier.title: You don't need them to trust you.
verifier.subtitle: The client has the report. They verify it themselves, without accessing GeoTapp. If the data matches the real work, the seal holds. If anyone has modified the document, the seal breaks. No appeal.

features.integrity: Tamper-proof data: The report is generated from real field data and locked. Any modification makes it invalid — no appeal.
features.independent: Autonomous verification: Anyone with the report can verify its authenticity — no account, no platform access needed.

core.title: One system, three levels of certainty
core.subtitle: TimeTracker records on the field. Flow organises in the office. Verifier certifies everything matches. A closed loop, no gaps.

features.title: Real input from the field
features.desc: TimeTracker works offline and syncs automatically. Every recorded data point is authentic, with location and timestamp.

features.title: Privacy by design
features.desc: Location is recorded only at clock-in and clock-out. No continuous tracking. Fully GDPR compliant.

features.title: Real-time operational control
features.desc: Field data arrives in Flow immediately. The office has live visibility without calling anyone.

features.title: Defensible proof over time
features.desc: Every report is locked on real field data — not alterable after generation. Dispute? The data is there. Verifiable by anyone. Always.

footer_cta.title: Stop losing undocumented work.
footer_cta.subtitle: Every job without verifiable proof is a job that can be disputed. GeoTapp closes this gap.

settori.title: Verifiable documentation for every sector — GeoTapp Solutions
settori.subtitle: Choose your sector to see how GeoTapp generates work proof — to show your client when disputes arise.

installatori.desc: Electricians, Plumbers, System Installers. Every job documented with GPS and photos — tamper-proof data, verifiable by the client.

sicurezza.name: Security

pulizie.name: Cleaning
pulizie.desc: Cleaning companies, Facility, Multiservice. Every round documented and verifiable by the client — zero disputes.

elettricisti.name: Electricians
elettricisti.desc: Electrical installations, panels, cabling. Every job documented with GPS and photos — tamper-proof evidence to close any dispute.

idraulici.name: Plumbers
idraulici.desc: Plumbing, heating, boilers. GPS job reports with before-and-after photos — zero disputes about work completed.

flow.desc: Operational management, jobs, coordination and reports.

timetracker.desc: Attendance, field activity and work proof.

flow.hero_title:
GeoTapp Flow.
Field Operations Management.
flow.hero_subtitle: The operational centre for companies with field technicians and operators. Manage jobs, coordinate teams and produce structured, verifiable work reports.
flow.grid_subtitle: Every module is designed for real control of field work. Click to explore.
flow.cta_title: Take real control of your field.

nexus-core.name: Job Management
nexus-core.short: Create and manage technical interventions. Assign tasks to technicians, monitor progress and keep everything tracked per job.
nexus-core.full:
### Central Job Control.

Every intervention starts as a structured job.
**Job Management** gives you a clear view of all work in progress.

#### Intervention Management

Create a job, assign the technician, define the site and date.
Monitor status: Open, In Progress, Completed.

#### Operational History

Every job has a complete archive of activities, photo proofs, notes and timestamps.
The client asks what was done? You have the data. Always.

titan-flow.name: Task Assignment
titan-flow.short: Distribute work to technicians with precision. Communicate instructions, deadlines and operational priorities in a structured way.
titan-flow.full:
### The Right Job to the Right Technician.

Confused task assignment generates delays and disputes.
**Task Assignment** brings operational clarity.

#### Precise Distribution

As soon as a job is opened, assign one or more technicians.
Each technician sees their work on GeoTapp TimeTracker.

#### Operational Communication

Instructions, notes, technical attachments: everything reaches the technician before they leave for the field.
Fewer calls, fewer misunderstandings, fewer delays.

ledger-prime.name: Reports and Billing
ledger-prime.short: Generate structured reports from every job. Export documentation and support billing with real field data.
ledger-prime.full:
### From Work to Report, in an Orderly Way.

Manual billing is slow and often incomplete.
**Reports and Billing** closes the operational cycle.

#### Structured Reports

Every completed intervention generates documentation by collecting timestamps, photos and notes from the field.
No data to enter manually — it all comes from TimeTracker.

#### Billing Support

Real job data supports more accurate quotes and invoices.
Fewer errors, fewer disputes, faster administrative cycle.

quantum-logistics.name: Intervention Calendar
quantum-logistics.short: Plan interventions, visualise the operational calendar and manage team availability without overlaps.
quantum-logistics.full:
### Full View of Planned Work.

Without a shared calendar, planning becomes chaotic.
**Intervention Calendar** gives you clear operational visibility.

#### Advanced Planning

View all interventions on daily, weekly and monthly calendar views.
Identify overlaps and optimise workload distribution.

#### Team Availability

See who is available, who is on leave and who is already overloaded.
Assign new interventions without creating operational conflicts.

supply-command.name: Resource Management
supply-command.short: Control materials, equipment and operational resources needed for each field intervention. No surprises.
supply-command.full:
### No Intervention Short of Resources.

Sending a technician to the field without the right materials is a costly mistake.
**Resource Management** prevents operational surprises.

#### Materials per Job

Link required resources to each job.
The manager sees in advance what is needed and when.

#### Suppliers and Procurement

Store contact details and terms for your regular suppliers.
Reduce procurement time and keep costs under control.

the-architect.name: Work Planning
the-architect.short: Organise work into phases, tasks and deadlines. Keep the project under control without spreadsheets or WhatsApp messages.
the-architect.full:
### Structure the Work. Control the Progress.

Complex jobs require structure.
**Work Planning** brings operational order.

#### Phases and Deadlines

Structure complex interventions into operational phases with clear deadlines.
Assign responsibilities to each team member.

#### Progress Monitoring

Visualize progress in real time.
Always know what has been done and what remains open.
Act before a delay becomes a client problem.

the-auditor.name: Intervention Documentation
the-auditor.short: Collect photo evidence, operational notes and signed documents for every intervention. Work performed stays verifiable.
the-auditor.full:
### Real Proof for Every Intervention.

Without documentation, completed work is contestable.
**Intervention Documentation** makes every job verifiable.

#### Photo Evidence

Technicians take photos directly from GeoTapp TimeTracker on the field.
Images are automatically linked to the job with timestamp and location.

#### Digital Client Signature

The client can sign the work report directly on the technician's screen.
The digital signature is included in the report and constitutes proof of service delivered.

the-uplink.name: Field-to-Office Link
the-uplink.short: Data collected by TimeTracker arrives in Flow in real time. Field and office work on the same operational data.
the-uplink.full:
### Office and Field, Finally Connected.

The disconnect between field and office generates avoidable errors, delays and disputes.
**Field-to-Office Link** closes the gap.

#### Real-time Synchronisation

Every clock-in, photo and note recorded on TimeTracker arrives in Flow immediately.
The manager has a live view without having to call the technician.

#### Reliable History

Everything the technician records on the field is archived and linked to the job.
No data is lost. No information is missing when it is time to report.

the-oracle.name: Operational Visibility
the-oracle.short: Real-time operational dashboard. Always know how many interventions are open, in progress or completed today.
the-oracle.full:
### Operational Data, Not Assumptions.

Deciding without reliable data is dangerous.
**Operational Visibility** turns field data into concrete information.

#### Operational Dashboard

See in real time:
- Open and in-progress interventions
- Active technicians
- Interventions completed today and this week

#### Periodic Reports

Receive automated activity summaries.
Compare periods, identify bottlenecks and optimise operations.

app.hero_title:
GeoTapp TimeTracker.
The Field in Your Pocket.
app.hero_subtitle: The mobile app used by technicians to record activity, collect proof and maintain the operational thread directly from the field. Available on Android and iOS.
app.grid_subtitle: Every feature is designed for those who work outside the office and have no time to waste. Click to explore.
app.cta_title: Give your technicians the right tool.

timelock-alpha.name: GPS Time Tracking
timelock-alpha.short: Clock-in and clock-out linked to GPS position and precise timestamp. Every work session becomes a verifiable operational event.
timelock-alpha.full:
### Time is Verifiable.

Timestamps without verification generate disputes.
**GPS Time Tracking** makes every work session a reliable, defensible record.

#### Geolocated Clock-in and Clock-out

The technician records entry and exit from the field.
Location, address and time are registered automatically.

#### Immutable History

Every session is a verifiable record: start time, end time, position, duration and associated job.
The client asks when you arrived? The data is there, always.

event-horizon.name: Shift Planning
event-horizon.short: Manage shifts and staff availability. Weekly and monthly views for coordination without confusion or overlaps.
event-horizon.full:
### No Shift Conflicts.

Organising mobile personnel requires clarity.
**Shift Planning** gives the manager a precise, up-to-date view.

#### Calendar View

See who works when.
Identify absences, holidays and overlaps before they become operational problems.

#### Real-time Availability

Employees confirm attendance or report absences directly from the app.
The manager sees gaps in the schedule before assigning new jobs.

unit-matrix.name: Operator Registry
unit-matrix.short: Manage a complete record of your operators: roles, contacts, certifications and platform access.
unit-matrix.full:
### Know Your Team.

Every operator is a key operational resource.
**Operator Registry** centralises all vital information.

#### Certification Management

See at a glance who holds the required qualifications for a specific intervention or site.

#### Rapid Onboarding

Adding a new technician is simple.
Send an invite link: within minutes they are operational on GeoTapp TimeTracker.

sector-grid.name: Sites and Worksites
sector-grid.short: Create a database of operational sites and worksites. Link each intervention to the correct location and organise teams by zone.
sector-grid.full:
### Every Intervention in the Right Place.

Working without geographic reference generates confusion.
**Sites and Worksites** brings operational clarity.

#### Site Database

Create a catalogue of client sites, worksites and operational locations.
The system automatically links technician activity to the intervention site.

#### Zone-based Teams

Organise technicians into teams by site or geographic area.
Assign interventions to the correct team, not just the individual.

energy-logistics.name: Vehicle and Expense Management
energy-logistics.short: Track company vehicle usage, fuel consumed and travel expenses for field staff.
energy-logistics.full:
### Every Trip Documented.

Travel expenses are a critical item for any company with mobile staff.
**Vehicle Management** monitors every outgoing cost.

#### Vehicle Usage

Temporarily assign a vehicle to an employee for an intervention.
Always know who is using which vehicle and for which job.

#### Fuel Expenses

The employee records refuelling directly from the app with a receipt photo and amount.
Everything archived, everything linked to the job.

neural-link.name: Operational Communications
neural-link.short: Internal channel for company communications. Targeted messages to specific groups with read confirmations.
neural-link.full:
### Clear Communications. No Background Noise.

WhatsApp mixes private and professional life and offers no control over read status.
**Operational Communications** is the official company channel.

#### Targeted Messages

Notify only the team that needs to know.
Shift change at the Rome site? Only the assigned technicians receive the message.

#### Read Confirmations

Always know who read the communication and who did not.
Clear and transparent accountability for everyone.

payroll-bridge.name: Attendance Export
payroll-bridge.short: Export monthly attendance in formats compatible with the main payroll software. Less manual work, fewer errors.
payroll-bridge.full:
### Payroll Without Headaches.

Month end does not have to be an administrative nightmare.
**Attendance Export** connects field operations to HR administration.

#### Multi-Format

Generate attendance files ready for import into the main payroll software (Zucchetti, INAZ, TeamSystem).

#### Consultant Access

Give limited access to your payroll firm.
They download the data they need independently, without calling you every month end.

data-core.name: Weekly Reports
data-core.short: Detailed reports on hours worked per job and per operator. Reliable data for internal control and billing.
data-core.full:
### Data Does Not Lie.

Make decisions based on facts, not impressions.
**Weekly Reports** extracts value from daily operations.

#### Detailed Reports

Every week, a complete picture: who worked, where, on which job and for how long.

#### Full Transparency

Employees and managers consult the same monthly report.
Hours counted are identical for everyone.
No disputes at month end.

identity-forge.name: Branded App
identity-forge.short: Upload your logo and choose your company colours. Your operators use an app that reflects your brand identity.
identity-forge.full:
### Your Company, Your App.

Do not use a generic app.
Make your employees feel part of YOUR company with a consistent visual experience.

#### Company Logo

Your logo prominently displayed on the login screen and main dashboard.

#### Company Colours

Choose the colour theme that fits your corporate image.
Professional, consistent, recognisable.

cosa_vedrai.title: Verifiable reports

cosa_vedrai.title: Team management from Flow

download_page.title: Download GeoTapp
download_page.subtitle: Choose the version that fits your needs.
download_page.demo_report_desc: Download a real report generated by GeoTapp. It contains verified GPS, photo evidence, operator hash chain and cryptographic seal. You can verify its authenticity directly on geotapp.com.
download_page.windows_desc: The complete desktop application for business management. Ideal for administration and full control.
download_page.wp_desc: Integrate GeoTapp into your company website. Allow employees to access directly from your intranet.

chi_siamo.hero_desc: GeoTapp was not invented by investors or analysts. It was born from the real frustration of someone who works every day amid deadlines, job sites and demanding clients.
story: It was 2024. Mike Petraroli, our founder, was working as an employee and had an apparently trivial but incredibly costly problem: proving his own work.
At the end of the month, the hour counts never added up. Jobs done on the run between clients were forgotten. Paper got lost, WhatsApp messages got buried. It was a silent drain of time and money.

He looked for a solution. He found only complex, expensive software full of useless charts and lacking substance. Software built by people who had never clocked in or issued an invoice in an emergency from a van.
So Mike decided to build the tool he wished he'd had himself: simple, mobile, with verifiable proof. Not for investors — for companies like his.

values.title: Clear Mission
values.desc: Make every job measurable and verifiable. Field work deserves the same transparency tools as an office.

values.title: Dedicated Team
values.desc: We are a small team obsessed with the problem we solve. Every feature comes from real feedback, not marketing roadmaps.

values.title: Privacy by Design
values.desc: We do not sell data, we do not track continuously. GPS only at the moment of clock-in, zero surveillance.

values.title: Made in Italy
values.desc: Developed in Italy for the Italian and European market. GDPR rules, work culture and local regulations are in the product's DNA.

chi_siamo.cta_desc: We're not an unreachable Big Tech company. We're real people building software for real people.
chi_siamo.mission_quote: Field work deserves the same transparency tools as an office.

blog.hero_desc: We don't write to fill pages. We write to share what we learn building the future of verifiable work.
blog.no_posts: No articles available at the moment.
blog.cta_desc: Full access to all modules. No credit card, no commitment.
blog.schema_desc: Guides and insights on field work certification, team management, GDPR and geolocation.
blog.meta_desc: Guides, insights and resources on team management, field work certification, GDPR and geolocation. From the GeoTapp team.
